name: TestResetNamespaceSysVarValues
title: TestResetNamespaceSysVarValues
description: Resets all system variables of the given namespace and all sub-namespaces to their initial value. If no initial value is defined for a system variable, the system variable is not set.
aNamespace is not allowed to be empty. If system variables without namespace should be reset, TestResetSysVarValue has to be used.

parameters.name: aNamespace
parameters.description: Namespace which system variables should be reset.
